# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe clearly what this pull request changes and why the change is necessary.

## Type of Change

Select the applicable option:

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Experimental change
- [ ] Dataset or preprocessing change
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Other

## Related Issue

Reference the related issue, when applicable:

Closes #[issue number]

## Changes Introduced

- [Change 1]
- [Change 2]
- [Change 3]

## Reproduction and Validation

Describe how the change was tested or validated.

Include:

- commands executed;
- input data;
- configuration;
- random seeds, when applicable;
- expected and observed results.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change has one clear objective.
- [ ] The documentation was updated.
- [ ] Tests or validation procedures were executed.
- [ ] No credentials, private keys, or personal data were committed.
- [ ] No machine-specific absolute paths were added.
- [ ] New dependencies and versions were documented.
- [ ] Results are reproducible from the provided instructions.
- [ ] Authors and contributions were updated when necessary.

## Additional Notes

Add limitations, pending work, screenshots, logs, or other relevant information.
